hero.subheadline: Upload your lecture materials and let Study GPT build you a personalised learning journey — summaries, quizzes, and an AI tutor, all in one place.

features.headline: Everything you need to ace your exams
features.subheadline: Stop drowning in notes. Study GPT transforms your raw materials into the tools that actually work.

items.title: AI Summaries
items.description: Instant, bite-sized notes distilled from long lecture documents — no more reading 80 pages the night before.

items.title: Smart Quizzes
items.description: Flashcards and practice questions generated directly from your content, tailored to how you learn best.

items.title: 24/7 AI Tutor
items.description: Ask anything about your material and get clear, contextual explanations at any hour of the day.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.description: See exactly where you stand, what you've mastered, and where to focus your energy next.

items.title: Multi-format Upload
items.description: Supports PDFs, PowerPoint slides, and Word documents. Just upload and let the AI do the work.

items.title: Organised Library
items.description: All your courses, summaries, and quizzes in one clean space — always at your fingertips.

about.headline: Built for students, by people who remember struggling
about.body_1: Study GPT started with a simple frustration — hundreds of pages of lecture notes, not enough time, and no clear path to understanding. We built the tool we wished we had.
about.body_2: Today, tens of thousands of students use Study GPT to cut through information overload, retain more, and walk into exams with confidence.
about.value_1_desc: Every decision we make starts with one question: does this help students learn better?
about.value_2_desc: We surface your own material, not generic content. The AI works with what you give it.
about.value_3_desc: We ship updates constantly based on real feedback from real students.

testimonials.headline: What students are saying
testimonials.subheadline: From first-year undergraduates to postgrad researchers — here's how Study GPT changed their approach.

items.quote: I uploaded three months of biochemistry notes and had a complete revision pack ready in under five minutes. Absolutely changed how I study.
items.name: Sarah K.

items.quote: The AI tutor actually explains things in context. It's not just spitting out facts — it connects ideas across my lectures.
items.name: James O.

items.quote: My grades went from Cs to As in one semester. The quizzes forced me to actually recall things instead of just re-reading.
items.name: Lina M.

items.quote: As an Arabic speaker, being able to switch the interface to Arabic made everything so much more comfortable to use.
items.name: Omar F.

footer.tagline: Making learning feel possible — one lecture at a time.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Study GPT. Keep growing, you're doing great.
